author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 high-impact foundation Tier-3s.

- kernel/bpf/bpf-core.md: covers kernel/bpf/core.c — BPF runtime core: bpf_prog struct + refcount, interpreter (__bpf_prog_run computed-goto switch over eBPF ISA), JIT bridge to per-arch jit_compile, tail-call infrastructure (MAX_TAIL_CALL_CNT=33 cap), dispatcher (text-poke trampoline patching for chained progs), prog_array (cgroup/kprobe/tp/xdp attach), prog kallsyms registration. 8 REQ / 7 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + tailcall-overflow + dispatcher-atomicity + pack-pool-OOB) / Layer-2 TLA+ (dispatcher_swap + tail_call_chain) / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus interpreter↔JIT semantic equivalence.
- drivers/iommu/iommu-core.md: covers drivers/iommu/iommu.c — vendor-agnostic IOMMU API: iommu_ops trait, iommu_domain (DMA/UNMANAGED/IDENTITY/SVA/BLOCKED/NESTED types), iommu_group (DMA-alias + ACS-isolation grouping), per-device probe/attach/detach lifecycle, default-domain selection per cmdline + RMRR + group policy, sysfs /sys/kernel/iommu_groups/ surface, per-device fault handler dispatch, reserved-region enumeration (MSI-X + RMRR + soft-MSI). 8 REQ / 7 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + OOB + alignment) / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus map↔unmap inverse.

Total state: 238 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 4 Tier-3s.

Knowledge pages: design-kernel-bpf-bpf-core, design-drivers-iommu-iommu-core.

Next iter plan: virt/kvm/kvm-core.md (KVM main vm/vcpu fd lifecycle + ioctl dispatch + vCPU thread loop) + drivers/pci/probe.md (PCI bus enumeration + recursive scan + device creation).
